name: Frog Spell shower gummy
description: A fun, squishy shower gummy in the shape of a frog, lathering up with a magical, enchanting scent to transform your shower into a witch's cauldron.
archive_note: A Halloween Kitchen exclusive shower gummy, part of the autumnal spellbook-themed range.
nostalgia_angle: Part of Lush's beloved Halloween Kitchen exclusives, a product format fans look forward to each year.
throwback_reference: A nod to classic witch's familiar imagery — the frog as a magical creature — rendered in Lush's playful shower gummy format.
